programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara menggunakan konsep terbuka atau sesi perkongsian daripada pelawak-pelawak yang akan menceritakan pengalaman dan kisah yang mereka tidak pernah kongsi dengan masyarakat.

programme.title: Berita Sangat Serius Ep366
programme.desc: Ingin tahu tentang berita dan isu semasa yang viral dan hangat diperkatakan oleh netizen? Saksikan Berita Sangat Serius yang pasti membuat anda tertawa sambil mendapat info berguna.

programme.title: Man Laksa
programme.desc: Man Laksa, pemuda yang pemalu menjalani hidup sederhana dengan menjual laksa di kampungnya. Dia menaruh hati pada gadis bernama Chah, namun tidak berbuat apa-apa kerana Chah adalah anak ketua kampung.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2021 Ep01
programme.desc: Jep, Rahim, dan Pak Ya kini kembali menghiburkan anda secara langsung! Saksikan mereka bersama tetamu jemputan, Atikah Suhaime dan siapa pula 'cameo' yang bakal muncul?

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagha Ep02
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Syamsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Kiah Pekasam Ep03
programme.desc: Sebuah drama bersiri komedi yang mencuit hati dan dibintangi oleh pelakon popular, Rozita Che Wan.

programme.title: Kiah Pekasam Ep04
programme.desc: Sebuah drama bersiri komedi yang mencuit hati dan dibintangi oleh pelakon popular, Rozita Che Wan.

programme.title: Muzikal Lawak Superstar 2 Ep02
programme.desc: Saksikan Nabil Ahmad and Elly Mazlein sebagai pengacara, serta Dato' Awie, Fazura and Zul Ariffin sebagai juri kepada 14 kumpulan yang bakal berentap bergelar juara MLS musim kedua!

programme.title: Layan Je! Abe Zizan Can Do It! Ep05
programme.desc: Zizan Razak akan mencabar diri dengan melakukan aktiviti lasak dan ekstrim. Selain aktiviti ekstrim, Zizan juga dicabar untuk memasak! Berjayakah Zizan dalam melaksanakan semua cabaran?

programme.title: Layan Je! MLM and MLS Ep21
programme.desc: Saksikan kompilasi terbaik Maharaja Lawak Mega and Muzikal Lawak Superstar istimewa buat tontonan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Layan Je! Annyeonghaseyo Cikgu Maryam Ep01
programme.desc: Jangan lupa saksikan sketsa lucu dan menghiburkan dalam Annyeonghaseyo Cikgu Maryam hanya di Astro Warna and On Demand.

programme.title: Motif Viral Junior Ep21
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merungkai perkara pelik dan viral yang terjadi di Malaysia. Kali ini, kita akan mendengar apa pandangan kanak-kanak terhadap perkara tersebut.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang Ep02
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular 'Betul Ke Bohong' yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik bersama hos Johan dan Ozlynn

programme.title: Abe Zizan Can Do It! Ep02
programme.desc: Untuk episod kali ini, Zizan menyahut cabaran dari peminatnya untuk bermain Go Kart. Eh, tapi siapa pula yang datang nak cabar Zizan racing Mini-GP pulak ni? Sama ke macam ride motor lain?

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat Ep02
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin and Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak Ep02
programme.desc: Rancangan temubual biacara bersama pelawak yang di pentas kan di atas trak di kawasan luar bandar bersama hos Along dan Azlee.

programme.title: Setinggan
programme.desc: Penduduk kawasan setinggan menjadi mangsa gangguan hantu dari sebuah kubur tentera jepun. Antara yang menjadi mangsa gangguan ialah keluarga Pak Sudin. Burn dan 3 orang anak gadis.

programme.title: Saka Sisters Ep03
programme.desc: Suri arahkan Jamal untuk cari dan selamatkan Alia. Tetapi Jamal perlukan arahan dari Laila juga kerana mereka berdua berkongsi milik sakanya itu.

programme.title: Saka Sisters Ep04
programme.desc: Taqriz beritahu Suri dan Laila tentang masalah Ajis and orang kampung. Jamal jadi teruja bila dengar ada hantu perlu dihapuskan.

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2018 Ep02
programme.desc: Barisan pelawak popular tanah air kembali berentap bagi merebut gelaran juara. Bersama hos Dato' AC Mizal, siapakah yang bakal dinobatkan sebagai juara Maharaja Lawak Mega 2018?

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini Ep02
programme.desc: Rancangan ini menggabungkan pelbagai elemen komedi, sketsa, lakonan, nyanyian, tarian dan juga candawara istimewa bersama para pelawak ternama yang turut menampilkan artis dan selebriti popular.

programme.title: Tak Kot Ep02
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular tanah air bercuti sambil dicabar menangani fobia yang terdapat dalam diri mereka. Berjayakah mereka menyelesaikan misi?

programme.title: Berita Sangat Serius Ep367
programme.desc: Ingin tahu tentang berita dan isu semasa yang viral dan hangat diperkatakan oleh netizen? Saksikan Berita Sangat Serius yang pasti membuat anda tertawa sambil mendapat info berguna.

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Pok Ya Cong Codei
programme.desc: Pok Ya merupakan seorang samseng gedebe di Kelantan. Dia mendapat tugasan untuk mencari anak seorang peniaga yang diculik di Kuala Lumpur.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2021 Ep02
programme.desc: Pada episod ini, geng Sepahtu akan bersama dengan tetamu undangan iaitu Aprena Manrose, Oktavia Manrose dan Hamdan Senario. Nantikan siapa pula cameo yang bakal muncul?

programme.title: J-POP Ep02
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Jiggy Masin, saksikan sebuah 'game show' baru yang turut boleh disertai oleh penonton dan menangi hadiah menarik pada setiap minggu.

programme.title: Lawak Solo Ep02
programme.desc: Lawak Solo, pencarian bakat komedi solo pertama di Malaysia. Di hoskan oleh Johan dan Fad.

programme.title: Mystery Ranking Show Malaysia Ep02
programme.desc: Saksikan panel pembongkar menyusun kedudukan 5 peserta dengan tema dan persembahan bakat berbeza pada setiap minggu. Berjaya atau tidak para panel menyusun kedudukan dengan betul?

programme.title: Bas Stop! Ep02
programme.desc: Selebriti dan pelawak mengalami situasi sebenar kehidupan seharian seperti pemandu teksi, pembaiki kasut, penyanyi jalanan dan pelbagai lagi dalam mengetengahkan isu-isu yang dihadapi dari sudut komikal.

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S2 Ep02

programme.title: The Kill List Triangle The Dark Side
Teddies
programme.desc: When Meeks causes his birdie friend to feel sick by feeding her too many teddy treats, he learns from his friends that birds should be eating worms, insects, or fruit - and not teddy treats. Tizzy decides to set up her own food delivery service. However, it becomes so popular that she has trouble remembering everyone's orders, and gets them all mixed up.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs and Stories
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of Pinkfong's most loved songs and stories with all your favourite characters!

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.sub-title: We Wonder What Happened to Snowman
programme.desc: This season is all about playful problem solving, with the recurring use of the mantra "I wonder, what if, let's try!".

programme.title: Orange Moo-Cow
programme.desc: The series follows the daily life of Zoh, an energetic 6-year-old cow, and her little brother Boh, a sensitive and curious 4-year-old bull. Along with Mommy Cow, Father Bull and their young friends -- Cathy the Cat, Grey the Wolf, and many others-- Zoh and Boh fill their everyday life with fun. Follow them on their daily adventures as they try to find the answers to their many questions!

programme.title: 123 Number Squad
programme.desc: The Number Squad uses their math skills to figure out how to keep the Farm Haywire's chickens from flying off the roof of his barn while he makes some adjustment to the new feed machine. The Number Squad is lost as Tim has trouble using the 5 set of directions to giving proper instructions to help them find Maurice's lost sea lion puppy! Fortunately, Number 5 may be able to help them.

programme.title: The Little Prince And His Friends
programme.desc: In this new series, two children (Elijah and Charlotte) begin a fabulous journey to the stars with the Little Prince and his fantastic crew, the Fox and the Rose. An extraordinary journey aboard the most brilliant and unexpected of spaceships.

programme.title: The Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: The daily adventures of penguins living in New York's Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: A Wild Year On Earth
programme.desc: This landmark six-part documentary series charts the planet's most spectacular events of migration, rebirth and transformation. Over the course of a turbulent year, we witness how finely tuned creatures face the Earth's seasonal patterns. However, in the 21st Century these patterns are becoming more extreme, less predictable and dangerously unreliable. From Asia to Europe, Africa, Australia, North and South America - we witness the drama and the spectacle.

programme.title: Losing Myself
programme.desc: Jonathan Yap can fall asleep at any time due to a rare sleeping disorder called narcolepsy. Jin Yuan has a brain tumour that causes him to have epileptic attacks that leaves him unconscious. Despite holding an honours degree in accountancy, he has not been able to find a full time job since he graduated. How do they grapple with losing consciousness unexpectedly and redefine the purpose of life?

programme.title: Hello Singapore

programme.title: My One And Only
programme.desc: A grieving Zhongyi tells May to repent when she calls him. Limin and Zixiong call the cops. Zhongyi is distraught when May is arrested. Haojian helps Zixiong get over Huiling's death. Zhongyi pulls himself together and signs up for a volunteering course. Baoyou tries to reach out to Bowen by talking about durians. She catches Defu apologising to Bowen secretly.

programme.title: Foodie Trio
programme.desc: In this episode, Foodie Trio will introduce 3 different beef dishes that includes a traditional beef noodle dish with a rich history, a mini version of a Western classic dish, and a creative French cuisine they've never tasted. Which of these delicious dishes will they fall in love with? They will also visit a local mushroom farm to learn some interesting facts about mushroom cultivation.

programme.title: I Do, Do I?

In this episode, six foreign friends from different countries traveled to Guizhou to get to know Guizhou's different ethnic groups and folk cultures in different parts of Guizhou.Foreign friends are all touched by Guizhou's unique culture. The beauty of Guizhou makes them linger and Guizhou's customs make them refreshing.

They accidentally get together and start a new life with many different situations.

programme.title: Hand of God- The Secret Repair Technique
programme.desc: A father and son restorers who are known as the "God Hands" for their skills in completely erasing scratches and damages on national treasure class ceramics. The treasures they have restored include a 450-year-old black raku tea bowl from the Sen family of the tea ceremony, a large Old Imari dish destroyed in an old castle in Vienna, and over 5,000 other items. NHK’s cameras go into their secret workplace, which is never shown to the public.

programme.title: Drama "The Honest Real Estate Agent" Encore Eps.6
programme.desc: Nagase works for a real estate agent where he always achieves top sales by usage of sales talk which may not always contain the full truth. One day, he becomes cursed to be unable to tell lies, by breaking a small shrine at a planned construction site. Since then, he spoils contracts by telling customers everything including what he does not have to. This is his story of trying to find a way to survive as a 'too honest' agent.
